meta.title: Siren | Ambassadors
meta.description: Siren was rehomed to Alveus as the previous sanctuary's owner was retiring. Siren sadly passed away in January 2026 due to complications from heart disease.

data.name: Siren
data.story:
Siren was rehomed to Alveus as the previous sanctuary's owner was retiring.

Siren sadly passed away in January 2026 due to complications from heart disease.
data.mission: She is an ambassador for how the pet trade has affected her parrot species and many others around the world.
